# Timeline

- **2026-01-10** — architecture workshop aligns on a three-service deployment.
- **2026-01-24** — the team publishes the operating rhythm and review gates.
- **2026-02-03** — a capacity review sets initial scaling thresholds.
- **2026-02-17** — rollout documents and checklists are attached for launch readiness.
